mapper.sql: COALESCE(oc.opportunity_count, 0) AS opportunity_count, COALESCE(ec.employee_count, 0) AS employee_count, COALESCE(upc.user_permission_count, 0) AS user_permission_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT o.department_id, COUNT(1) AS opportunity_count FROM opportunities o GROUP BY o.department_id ) oc ON oc.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.department_id, COUNT(1) AS employee_count FROM employees e GROUP BY e.department_id ) ec ON ec.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT udp.department_id, COUNT(DISTINCT udp.user_id) AS user_permission_count FROM user_department_permissions udp GROUP BY udp.department_id ) upc ON upc.department_id = d.department_id
mapper.select:
-- 사업본부 관리 목록과 참조 건수를 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id, d.code, d.name, d.display_order, d.is_active,
FROM departments d
ORDER BY d.is_active DESC, d.display_order, d.department_id
-- 사업본부 코드 중복 여부를 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id FROM departments d WHERE d.code = #{code}
-- 활성 사업본부 수를 조회한다. SELECT COUNT(1) FROM departments d WHERE d.is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: -- 신규 사업본부를 등록한다. INSERT INTO departments ( code, name, display_order, is_active ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{displayOrder}, #{active} )
mapper.update: -- 사업본부 기본 정보를 수정한다. UPDATE departments SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
-- 사업본부를 비활성화한다. UPDATE departments SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
